info.title: CitSci API
info.description:
These are the API endpoints for the CitSci Platform.
[CitSci.org](https://citsci.org) and our [Mobile Apps](https://citsci.org/apps) consume this API.

post.summary: Retrieves an access token from Airtable to enable integration with CitSci
post.description:
This API call requires the OAuth Authorization Code and the PKCE Code Verifier from Airtable OAuth.

It will fetch an access token from Airtable and use it as part of the integration.

This token should authorize the CitSci clients(including this API interface) to access the protected resources

The access token authorizes and provides access to protected resources
